rulings.Case Title: AARON ANDERSON VS. 11TH & FOLSOM PRESERVATION AND COMMUNITY CENTERS, et al

rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Wednesday, March 18, 2009, line 12, Hearing regarding dismissal on Cross-Complaint. Continued to October 8, 2009, on the Court's own motion. =(302/CWW)

rulings.Case Title: THOMAS B GAINES et al VS. JOHNSON & JOHNSON, A NEW JERSEY CORPORATION et al
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Wednesday, March 18, 2009, line 1, DEFENDANT MCKESSON CORPORATION, JOHNSON & JOHNSON, MCNEIL CONSUMER HEALTHCARE, and, WAL-MART STORES, INC.'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION. Objections to sur-reply papers sustained. Request for judicial notice of Wyeth vs. Levine case is granted. Motion for Summary adjudication for failure to adequately warn is denied. Defendants failed to shift burden of proof. (See Wyeth vs. Levine.) Motion for Summary Adjudication for Breach of Warranty is denied. Privity established through reasonings in Gottsdanker vs. Cutter Laboratories, 182 Cal.App. 2nd, 602. Motion for Summary Adjudication for design defect, manufacturing defect, and punitive damages is granted. Plaintiff's raise no triable issue of fact that the Childrens Motrin was manufactured defectively or designed defectively. No clear and convincing evidence of oppression, fraud, or malice. (CC section 3294(a).). =(302/CWW/VC)

rulings.Case Title: 363 VALENCIA, LLC, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY VS. HILDELISA VASQUEZ et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: DEMURRER TO ANSWER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Wednesday, March 18, 2009, line 8, PLAINTIFF 363 VALENCIA, LLC'S DEMURRER TO FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT. Demurrer is overruled. The value of the controversy is less than $1,000.00 (Hall vs. Municipal Court (McGaskey), 10 Cal. 3rd, 641.) The demurrer fails to specifically set forth the grounds for the demurerr to each defense. (CRC 3.1320). =(302/CWW/JW)
